configPaths.purpose: Provider IDs, aliases, and compatible-provider prefixes
User-defined prefix for openai-compatible / anthropic-compatible nodes
Persist providerSpecificData.prefix from provider node into connection

prefixResolutionOrder: static alias from PROVIDER_ID_TO_ALIAS / provider key
notes: OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic-compatible nodes allow custom prefix; this is where values like cx/gpt-5.4 can appear.
If upstream /models already returns prefixed IDs, 9router strips recognized prefix then re-emits with outputAlias.
